core_skills: Full-stack development, AWS services, Cloud-based architectures, Software development practices, Scalable system architecture
skill_match_scores: Full-stack development:0.0, AWS services:1.0, Cloud-based architectures:1.0, Software development practices:1.0, Scalable system architecture:0.0
must_have_quals: At least 3 years of professional experience in full-stack development, Experience with AWS services and cloud-based architectures, Deep understanding of software development practices, scalable system architecture, security best practices and cloud-based platforms, Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to effectively troubleshoot complex issues, Excellent communication and collaboration skills; you thrive working closely with product managers, designers, and cross-functional teams, Comfortable working in a fast-paced, dynamic environment with evolving priorities
preferred_quals: Experience building products from 0-to-1 or in early-stage team environments, Experience with the complete software development life cycle, from design to deployment and operation, Experience with building secure, scalable, and performant software
core_responsibilities: Collaborate closely with product managers, designers, and other stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions, Have key responsibilities within the design, architecture, and end-to-end delivery of features across the full stack, Build and maintain frontend interfaces with React and backend services with Node.js and TypeScript, Write clean scalable code and test and deploy applications and systems, Revise, update, refactor, and debug code, Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and share knowledge, Be part of an engineering organization delivering high quality, secure, voice solutions to Aircall clients, Involvement in product and platform performance optimization and live site monitoring, Participate in an on-call rotation to respond to critical system issues and ensure continuous system reliability, Security is at the forefront of your mind in everything that you do
job_summary: Aircall is a unicorn, AI-powered customer communications platform used by 22,000+ companies worldwide. They are seeking a Software Engineer to join a new team focused on building an ambitious product that leverages voice and AI to transform sales operations.
